data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of checkpoint-by-checklist completion, specifically for tires, brakes, lights, and horn. While the evidence indicates that the inspection for the forklift was conducted and that one headlight was out (FAIL), it does not confirm that all checkpoints were completed or that the system properly handles the completion of all required checkpoints. The evidence does not provide a complete view of the inspection process, leading to a gap in validating the requirement. The specific failure of the lights does not address the overall requirement of completion for all checkpoints, which is necessary for full compliance.
gaps: No evidence confirming the completion of all required checkpoints (tires, brakes, lights, horn) as specified in the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate all checkpoint completions
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that all checkpoints (tires, brakes, lights, horn) are validated and recorded.
